metrics.title: Metric Analysis
metrics.subtitle: Learn KPIs, calculate metrics, and analyze with AI

education.title: Core KPIs
education.subtitle: Learn the most important metrics in the mobile gaming industry

dau.name: DAU (Daily Active Users)
dau.definition: The number of unique users who play the game in a single day.
dau.why: Shows the game's daily engagement strength. Declining DAU signals retention issues.

mau.name: MAU (Monthly Active Users)
mau.definition: The number of unique users who play the game within a month.
mau.why: Measures the total user base size. Fundamental for monetization and investor metrics.

arpdau.name: ARPDAU (Average Revenue Per DAU)
arpdau.definition: Average revenue per daily active user.
arpdau.why: The most critical monetization efficiency metric. Varies significantly by genre.

ltv.name: LTV (Lifetime Value)
ltv.definition: The total value of a user over their entire lifetime in the game.
ltv.why: Determines user acquisition budget. Game is sustainable if LTV > CPI.

cpi.name: CPI (Cost Per Install)
cpi.definition: The cost of acquiring a single new user.
cpi.why: Measures UA (User Acquisition) efficiency. LTV/CPI ratio should be > 1.

retention.name: Retention (D1/D7/D30)
retention.definition: The percentage of users who return on day 1, 7, and 30 after install.
retention.why: Measures game stickiness and long-term health. D1 > 40% is generally a good signal.

stickiness.name: Stickiness (DAU/MAU)
stickiness.definition: Measures how regularly active users play the game.
stickiness.why: High stickiness = users return daily. 20%+ is generally good.

arpu.name: ARPU (Average Revenue Per User)
arpu.definition: Average revenue per monthly active user.
arpu.why: Shows the monetary value of the total user base.
arpu.range: Varies significantly by genre and monetization model

sessionLength.name: Average Session Length
sessionLength.definition: The average time a user spends playing per session.
sessionLength.why: Measures engagement depth. Short sessions may indicate low engagement.
sessionLength.range: Hyper-casual: 2-7 min | Casual: 5-20 min | Mid-core: 10-40 min

sessionsPerDay.name: Sessions Per Day
sessionsPerDay.definition: The average number of times a user opens the game per day.
sessionsPerDay.why: Shows the strength of the habit loop. Higher count = stronger retention mechanics.
